name: missingNetwork
run: vehicle verify -s spec.vcl -v TestVerifier --network f:fake.onnx --property trivial --verifier-location=testVerifier --verifier-args='sat 'f_X[0]=0.2,f_Y[0]=3.0'' --cache verify-cache > /dev/null ; mv fake.onnx fake-changed.onnx && vehicle validate -c verify-cache -j && mv fake-changed.onnx fake.onnx

name: alteredNetwork
run:
vehicle verify -s spec.vcl -v TestVerifier --network f:fake.onnx --property trivial --verifier-location=testVerifier --verifier-args='sat 'f_X[0]=0.2,f_Y[0]=3.0'' --cache verify-cache > /dev/null ; echo "FAKE CHANGED ONNX NETWORK" > fake.onnx && vehicle validate -c verify-cache -j && echo "FAKE ONNX NETWORK
" > fake.onnx
